title: ICU Nurse
rawText: We are looking for a Registered Nurse with at least 2 years of ICU experience. Must be BLS and ACLS certified. Experience with patient monitoring systems is required. Knowledge of EMR systems is a plus. Must be willing to work on shifting schedules. Salary range: PHP 35,000 - 45,000 per month.

requirements: Willing to work on shifting schedules
